title: French Chicken Casserole
description: A classic French-inspired dish made with tender chicken, tangy sauce, and a crispy casserole top.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and cook in a skillet until browned.
In a separate pan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter and mix with the tangy sauce.
In a large baking dish, arrange a layer of cubed bread, followed by a layer of cooked chicken, and then a layer of tangy sauce.
Repeat the layers two more times, finishing with a layer of bread on top.
Sprinkle the grated cheese over the top and dot with the remaining 2 tablespoons of melted butter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
Let the casserole rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
